title: Castlevania: Symphony of the Night
edition_pinned: Row describes the 1997 PlayStation design; genre evidence from live PlayStation Store Castlevania Requiem listing (includes Symphony of the Night), observed 2026-07-13.
moat: RPG-stat exploration and new movement tools reopen an inverted castle map for optional mastery.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: One connected castle plus gear and transformation tools multiplies routes without new hubs.
exemplar_rationale: Pairs Metroid-like map gating with RPG loot in a single nonlinear castle.

evidence.claim: PlayStation Store product metadata Genre values listed: Action.
